title: ElytraIndicator
description: This mod adds a small indicator under the crosshair showing whether Elytra is equipped.
body:
The mod is inspired by [Marlow's video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WC8e5p09xLU), which shows a similar Elytra indicator. The mod adds a small hint under the crosshair to show whether Elytra is equipped.
![Elytras are equipped:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69c82163a9ffca63fa0398f506fff0f58f683a0f.png)
![Elytras are not equipped:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59bc6a4ed8c7d94b88fe671cef192ba0dcc93f54.png)
